issue: Country:USA was visible as a forced center node but had no graph edges, while findings referenced USA impact paths.
root_cause: The approved full-graph response sampled nodes before forcing the requested center. Edge emission requires both endpoints to be present, so USA-related dependency and risk nodes were absent and edges were dropped.
fix: Load center-related maritime dependency rows for requested Country centers.
Load center-related systemic risk rows for requested Country centers.
Load matching chokepoint risk indicator rows for those canals.
Force related TradeDependency, SystemicRiskResult, RiskFinding, MitigationAction, Chokepoint, Hazard, and RiskIndicator nodes into the response before edge construction.
Emit center-related dependency/risk edges after global edge construction.
